visual_elements.description: Consistent hashing is a distributed system concept that provides an efficient way to distribute keys across a cluster of servers.
It minimizes re-distribution when nodes are added or removed from the pool, which improves performance and scalability.
This technique maps both keys and server identifiers into a fixed-size circular space known as a hash ring.
Whenever there is no sufficient replica of a key for retrieval due to node failure, consistent hashing locates alternative nodes with minimal rehashing required.
